data.title: Orchestra BioMed plans public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants, with option for underwriters to purchase up to additional 15%.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Orchestra BioMed Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBIO) has initiated an underwritten public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants. The Company is offering all the securities, with a 30-day option for underwriters to purchase up to an additional 15% of shares and warrants. The public offering price per share will be less underwriting discounts and commissions. The completion of the Offering is dependent on market conditions, with no guarantee of finalization or specifics on size or terms disclosed.

data.title: Paramount Global reports Q2 2025 earnings results, conducts conference call at 4:30 p.m. Please visit Paramount Investors homepage for details.
data.description: Paramount Global disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, in New York on July 31, 2025. Traded as PARA and PARAA on NASDAQ, the company released the details on their website. Furthermore, a conference call scheduled for 4:30 p.m.EST is set to provide more insights into the results.

data.title: SR Bancorp reported $823,000 net income for Q4 2025, $0.10 per share. Company is the holding company for Somerset Regal Bank.
data.description: In Bound Brook, New Jersey on July 31, 2025, SR Bancorp, Inc. revealed that the company, which oversees Somerset Regal Bank, reported a net income of $823,000 for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. This equates to earnings of $0.10 per basic and diluted share. The company's stock is listed as NASDAQ: SRBK.
StoneX finalizes purchase of R.J. O’Brien, now top non-bank FCM in the US with expanded global multi-asset capabilities.

data.title: Wytec launches AI public safety solution with integrated technology under NCTCOG contract, aiming to combat gun and drug violence.
data.description: In San Antonio, Wytec International (OTCQB: WYTC) has launched its sales campaign for the "Integrated Public Safety Solution" (IPSS) that merges AI-driven In-Building Cellular, Gunshot Detection, and Drug Sensing technologies. Facilitated by a three-party collaboration, the IPSS represents a novel strategy for enhancing public safety efforts. Wytec developed the IPSS to address the surge in gun and drug-related violence in the U.S. and holds multiple patents for this groundbreaking solution.

data.title: APMEX, a top online precious metals retailer, celebrates 25 years of excellence, serving customers globally.
data.description: In July 2025, APMEX, a leading online retailer of precious metals in the United States, celebrates a significant achievement - 25 years of providing services to collectors and investors worldwide. Established as a trustworthy brand, APMEX has amassed a substantial customer base over the years.

data.title: Shell sells 16.125% stake in Colonial Enterprises Inc. to Colossus AcquireCo LLC, a Brookfield subsidiary.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Shell Midstream Operating LLC (SMUS), a branch of Shell plc, finalized the sale of its 16.125% stake in Colonial Enterprises, Inc. to Colossus AcquireCo LLC, a fully owned subsidiary of...

data.title: Woman Evolve and Wells Fargo team up for Mind Your Business Capital Pitch Competition to support entrepreneurs nationwide.
data.description: Entrepreneur CEO Fawn Weaver recently announced a capital pitch in Atlanta on July 31, 2025. This initiative showcases the collaboration between Woman Evolve and Wells Fargo to empower business owners in converting their ideas into successful ventures. The partnership emphasizes the fusion of faith, finance, and foresight, highlighting the shared vision to support budding entrepreneurs. This announcement underscores the dedication to fueling innovation and growth in the business world.

data.title: Toronto & Atlas Obscura to showcase Moving Monuments, a robotic sound sculpture by local artists, celebrating city's culture.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Destination Toronto and Atlas Obscura announced the collaboration behind Moving Monuments, a unique robotic percussion tower created by two innovative individuals in Toronto. The project involves a JUNO Award-winning artist and host of Netflix's Hip-Hop, combining music and technology to create an interactive experience. This monument is set to captivate audiences with its musical prowess, showcasing the city's creativity and pushing boundaries in the art scene.

data.title: Aeva reveals future of sensing tech, reports Q2 2025 results at Aeva Day in NYC. Key focus on unique perception platform for mass scale applications.
data.description: A technology company based in Mountain View, California, Aeva, recently held an event called Aeva Day: Beyond the Beam in New York City. During this event, they highlighted their innovative perception platform that can revolutionize sensing and perception in various industries on a large scale. Key stakeholders at the event, including customers, partners, and industry experts, discussed Aeva's exceptional performance and the increasing popularity of frequency modulation (FM) technology. Aeva, listed on NASDAQ as AEVA, is a frontrunner in next-generation sensing systems.

data.title: Lumitex launches 2025 Medical Lighting Report, provides insights for healthcare solutions.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on July 31, 2025, Lumitex, a leading provider of medical lighting solutions based in Cleveland, Ohio, unveiled its latest research findings in the form of the 2025 State of Medical Lighting Report. This report, aimed at advancing healthcare lighting solutions, offers cutting-edge insights and analysis. Lumitex, recognized as a global leader in the industry, has compiled a comprehensive overview that includes vital information for the sector.
CSX IS SAID TO WORK WITH GOLDMAN SACHS TO EXPLORE OPTIONS

data.title: Affordable pet healthcare provider Low Cost Pet Vax launches pet vaccination clinics in Austin, TX. Operating weekends, offering various services.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, starting July 31, 2025, Low Cost Pet Vax®, a prominent provider of budget-friendly pet health services in Texas, is offering cost-effective pet vaccines, flea/tick prevention, heartworm testing, and various services. These services are available at their clinics in Austin, TX, operating every weekend.

data.title: Dow Jones up on near China trade deal; Arm plunges on earnings. Figma IPO jumps 253%. Amazon gains, Apple fades.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average increased due to optimism surrounding a potential trade agreement with China. However, Nvidia collaborator Arm experienced a significant decline in earnings. The stock market witnessed a mixed performance, with most indexes falling, Amazon seeing gains, and Apple weakening ahead of its earnings report. Additionally, IPO Figma skyrocketed by 253%.

data.title: Laredo Oil reveals tech to access stranded oil reserves, vital for growing energy demand. #oil #LRDC #economy
data.description: In Austin, Texas on July 31, 2025, Laredo Oil, Inc. highlights the ongoing significance of oil as a crucial energy source for both the domestic and global economy. With expectations of increasing demand over the next 20 years, Laredo Oil (OTC: LRDC) aims to leverage this trend for its benefit.
